name: data-review-build
description: Prebuilt-artifacts build for the data-review dashboard: fetch error-review -> flags.py + build_data (Mongo suppression) -> upload data.json + flags.parquet to error-review/built/

source.buildspec:
version: 0.2
env:
  variables:
    DATA_REVIEW_DATA_ROOT: "/scratch"
    DATA_REVIEW_DB: "data_review"
    AWS_REGION: "ap-southeast-1"
  parameter-store:
    MONGODB_URI: "/mongodb/data-review/uri"
phases:
  build:
    commands:
      - echo "fetch error-review inputs"
      - python /app/fetch_inputs.py --chainlinked-uri s3://error-review/final/ --gmd-uri s3://error-review/final/GMD.dta --helpers-uri s3://error-review/helpers/ --region ap-southeast-1 --dest /scratch
      - echo "compute flags (with Mongo suppression)"
      - python /app/flags.py
      - echo "build data.json"
      - python /app/build_data.py
      - echo "upload artifacts to error-review/built/"
      - aws s3 cp /app/flags.parquet s3://error-review/built/flags.parquet
      - aws s3 cp /app/data.json s3://error-review/built/data.json
      - echo "done"
